name: ai-sdk-chat-component
intent: Create a chat component using the Vercel AI SDK with the Claude Code provider (ai-sdk-provider-claude-code) instead of the current MCP-based agent.chat tool. The component should be similar to the existing ConversationalAppBuilder but leverage AI SDK's streaming capabilities (streamText, useChat hooks) for a more standardized integration pattern.

indicators: Calls external service - Claude Code CLI via AI SDK provider
Has local state needs - chat messages, session state, loading/error states
Involves UI component development - React chat interface
Replaces existing MCP-based agent.chat pattern with AI SDK pattern
May need backend API route for AI SDK if running server-side
uncertainties: Should AI SDK run client-side (browser calls Claude CLI) or server-side (API route)?
How to integrate Wavesmith MCP tools - does the AI SDK provider support MCP servers?
Do we keep the existing agent.chat MCP tool or fully replace it?
Streaming approach - AI SDK has its own streaming primitives vs current SSE pattern
